expectations.text: Blocks implementation because no Kanban card is selected
expectations.evidence: Checked answer.md for required decision and terms.

expectations.text: Allows pre-card brainstorming, routing, sizing, read-only shaping, artifact choice, and proposed card drafting

expectations.text: Requires creating or selecting a card before target artifacts, code, investigation execution, or dispatch
expectations.evidence: Answer explicitly prohibits target artifacts, investigation, code, dispatch, progress, verification, completion, and handoff until complete card exists.
